notes: Single event in chunk: 10-Q (0001546417-25-000141) part 2 of 2 — MD&A franchise sales table, liquidity/capital resources, cash flows, goodwill/intangible impairment update, plus a no-material-change Risk Factors stub.
No fiscal_kpis in this chunk (those appear only on chunk_001).

Skipped 7 considered items: own stock-price/market-cap decline (outcome variable, not reusable cause), market multiples (vague valuation input), long-term growth rate and cash-flow estimates (internal model assumptions), convertible note hedge/warrant unwind (single-instance financing detail), Brazil one-month reporting-lag change (accounting presentation), Risk Factors section (boilerplate, no new content).
